news.title: Blueband Baking Demo - January 30, 2026
news.summary: Surya Pangan held a Baking Demo with Blueband at the Denpasar Demo Room. Led by Chef Felix, featuring many exciting tips and a special menu like Kastengel Roll Cake.
news.content: Denpasar, 30 January 2026 – Surya Pangan held a Baking Demo with Blueband at the Denpasar Head Office Demo Room. Attended by dozens of culinary business people and SMEs in Bali. Led by Chef Felix, participants were invited to explore creativity using Blueband Master products. Featured menus included Kastengel Roll Cake and premium cookie variations. In addition to baking techniques, Chef Felix shared tips on raw material cost management to increase business profits.

news.title: Grand Opening of Surya Pangan Munggu Branch
news.summary: Surya Pangan officially opened its new branch in Munggu. A lively event featuring an inauguration with local community leaders, door prizes, and free tastings for visitors.
news.content: Munggu, 13 September 2025 – Expansion continues as Surya Pangan officially opens a new branch in Munggu. The grand opening was lively throughout the week (13-20 September 2025). The inauguration was marked by a ribbon-cutting ceremony with local community leaders. Visitors were treated to attractive promotions, cooking tool door prizes, and free sampling sessions. The Munggu branch is expected to speed up food ingredient distribution for businesses in West Badung and surrounding areas.
